observations.archetype_gloss: The burden of unacknowledged choices and internalized guilt manifesting as crushing weight
observations.summary: Aviel embodies the Shadow archetype as he is overwhelmed by the consequences of his own choices, symbolized by the gray field and accumulating stones, representing the crushing weight of his internal conflict and unintegrated aspects of self.

evidence.quote: Aviel had seen the gray field, the accumulating stones, the crushing weight of his own choices made manifest.
